articles.author: Holly Ellyatt
articles.title: UK PM Starmer battles for political survival amid leadership challenge as gilt yields rise - CNBC
articles.description: Starmer said that key issues of growth, defense, the U.K.'s relationship with Europe and energy must be urgently addressed.
